title: Everything announced at Samsung Unpacked 2026: Three new foldables and two Galaxy Watches - Engadget
summary: The company is sticking to that approach this year with a mid-summer reveal of three new phones: the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Galaxy Z Flip 8.
